Who we are
AFI is a global property leader with a 30-year legacy, driven by a diverse professional team.
AFI develops, owns and operates landmark real estate properties in Israel and across Central and Eastern Europe (CEE), including business parks, office complexes, shopping malls, retail properties, multi-family residential projects, and mixed-use developments.
Read more
2024 ESG Report
Sustainability drives our construction.
Download now
Operating in multiple countries, and in a variety of projects
